news.headline: Methanex's Geismar methanol plant outage in Feb will be resolved by May; 1.8 million tonne plant affected.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on March 09, 2025, Methanex Corporation (TSX:MX) (Nasdaq:MEOH) shared news that their methanol plant, Geismar 3 (G3), located in Geismar, Louisiana, with a capacity of 1.8 million tonnes, experienced an unexpected shutdown in late February. After conducting thorough inspections, the decision was made by management to proceed with repairs to the autothermal reformer (ATR). The company anticipates restarting plant operations by early May 2025.

news.headline: China CFETS Renminbi Index decreases by 0.85 point on week
China Telecom, Hangzhou Antwork Network Technology, and Zhejiang University win Global Mobile Award at MWC25 for 5G UAV medical delivery network solution.
news.summary: In Hong Kong on March 7, 2025, it was announced that the Global Mobile Award (GLOMO) was presented to the 5G UAV medical delivery network solution at the 2025 Mobile World Congress (MWC25). This innovative solution was developed collaboratively by China Telecom, Hangzhou Antwork Network Technology, and Zhejiang University. The award recognizes the impact of their cutting-edge technology in the mobile industry. The solution aims to enhance medical delivery services using unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) and 5G technology. This achievement highlights the potential of this network solution to revolutionize medical logistics, with significant implications for improving efficiency and accessibility in the healthcare sector.

news.headline: 7&i Holdings issues letter to shareholders on engagement with Alimentation Couche-Tard on antitrust issues and succession process.
news.summary: In Tokyo on March 9, 2025, Seven & i Holdings Co., Ltd. issued a letter to shareholders concerning the ongoing discussions between the Special Committee and Alimentation Couche-Tard ("ACT"). The company, also known as 7&i, shared this communication to offer further insights into the engagement with ACT regarding an undisclosed matter.

Utah Senate passes Bitcoin bill with key provision removed, allowing state treasurer to invest in Bitcoin scrapped.
news.summary: Utah legislators recently approved a Bitcoin bill, but only after modifying it to exclude a provision allowing the state treasurer to invest in Bitcoin.

news.summary: Parade Technologies, based in San Jose, California, has recently acquired a majority of assets from Spectra7 to enhance their capabilities in high-speed data transmission. This acquisition aims to boost connectivity market opportunities for Parade Technologies.

news.headline: Faraday Future secures stockholder support for all proposals at special meeting of stockholders on March 7, 2025, including increasing authorized shares.
news.summary: Los Angeles-based Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIE) disclosed that all resolutions tabled at the special stockholders' meeting on March 7, 2025, have been given the green light. The nod for the proposition to augment the authorized shares of the Company’s common stock grants the Company the ability to fulfill its current commitments to dispense common stock shares as and when necessary, especially for the conversion of promissory notes.

FDA approves OMLYCLO® as first interchangeable biosimilar to XOLAIR® . Efficacy and safety comparable to reference drug.
news.summary: FDA has granted approval for OMLYCLO® (omalizumab-igec), marking it as the inaugural omalizumab biosimilar. Positive phase III data contributed to regulatory clearance for interchangeability, showcasing similar efficacy and safety levels to the reference product XOLAIR® (omalizumab). This milestone signifies a significant advancement in biosimilars, offering a promising alternative within the realm of healthcare.

Trump: US government funding lapse likely won't occur
LDRA supports MISRA C:2025, aiding safety-critical systems' compliance. Developers can now benefit from the updated guidelines for faster market time.
news.summary: In Wirral, England, LDRA has been a leader in MISRA C standards for many years. They have recently announced their support for the latest version, MISRA C:2025, issued by the MISRA C Working Group. With this update, developers can benefit from new guidelines, policy adjustments, and improvements facilitated by LDRA's automated static code analysis and reporting features. This support allows for quicker compliance and smoother processes, ultimately leading to faster product launches with improved quality.

news.headline: Methanex released its 2024 Sustainability Report in Vancouver, showcasing progress on key sustainability issues.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, Methanex Corporation (TSX:MX) (Nasdaq:MEOH) has unveiled its 2024 Sustainability Report, highlighting its advancements in key sustainability areas important to the company and its stakeholders. The report outlines the company’s efforts and accomplishments over the year and demonstrates its commitment to sustainability.

Kestra Medical Tech, Ltd. closed an upsized IPO of 11,882,352 shares at $17/share, raising $202M. Shares listed as "KMTS" on Nasdaq.
news.summary: Kestra Medical Technologies, Ltd. revealed the conclusion of its enlarged initial public offering, consisting of 11,882,352 common shares priced at $17.00 per share. This move generated roughly $202 million in total gross proceeds for Kestra before subtracting underwriting discounts and commissions alongside other offering expenses. The entire offer comprised shares from Kestra itself. Commencing March 6, 2025, Kestra's common shares have been actively trading on the Nasdaq Global Select Market using the symbol "KMTS".

news.headline: Better Choice Company (NYSE: BTTR) to discuss Q4 and full year 2024 financial results on March 27 at 4:30 p.m. ET.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida, on March 07, 2025, Better Choice Company Inc. (NYSE: BTTR), a pet health and wellness firm, disclosed plans to conduct a conference call and webcast on March 27, 2025, at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time. The purpose is to deliberate on their financial outcomes for Q4 and full year of 2024 and offer a business overview.

news.headline: Carney: Vows to Discover New Trade Partners, Ensure Borders
Trump orders bitcoin reserve as White House Crypto Summit convenes with officials and industry leaders. First-of-its-kind event.
news.summary: Industry leaders and officials from the Trump administration gathered on Friday for a groundbreaking event called the White House Crypto Summit. During the summit, Trump made a significant decision to establish a reserve of Bitcoin. This move marks a pivotal moment in the intersection of government and cryptocurrency, highlighting the increasing importance of digital assets in the financial landscape. The event's unique significance was underscored by the participation of key figures and signals a new era in how policymakers and industry players engage with emerging technologies.

news.headline: US government to audit cryptocurrency holdings post strategic Bitcoin reserve order. White House plans review to determine amount held, including 400,000 Bitcoin. Reserve funded by legal forfeitures, not taxpayers. No active increase in seized digital assets stockpile.
news.summary: The US government is set to conduct a comprehensive review of its cryptocurrency holdings after establishing a strategic Bitcoin reserve and a separate stash of various digital assets. A senior White House official revealed this prior to an important industry meeting, stating that the audit will offer a clearer understanding of the government's current cryptocurrency reserves. The newly created reserve will be financed with bitcoin acquired from legal forfeitures instead of taxpayer money. Additionally, the government will retain a separate collection of digital assets confiscated through similar legal proceedings. While the Bitcoin reserve could be expanded in the future, the stockpile of other digital currencies will not be actively increased beyond the currently forfeited amount. The official mentioned that the government previously held around 400,000 Bitcoin, primarily obtained following the closure of Silk Road, a notorious illicit online marketplace. Visit Benzinga.com for more details.

news.headline: Analyst expects 4 Bitcoin stocks to grow due to high-performance computing; Initiates buy ratings with price targets at $6.5 for Cipher Mining and $6 for Hive Digital Technologies. Cipher Mining has a projected first-quarter revenue of $47.78 million and EPS loss of 10 cents.
news.summary: Analyst Chris Brendler of Rosenblatt initiated coverage on Bitcoin stocks, predicting a likely premium due to their entry into the high-performance computing (HPC) business. He started with Cipher Mining (NASDAQ:CIFR) rating it a Buy with a price target of $6.5. Despite recent underperformance, the company is expected to scale rapidly with its 300 MW facility. Brendler forecasted first-quarter revenue of $47.78 million and an EPS loss of 10 cents. He also recommended Hive Digital Technologies (NASDAQ:HIVE) as a Buy with a target price of $6, noting its potential in the Bitcoin mining sector.

news.headline: Stock market plunges due to Trump tariff news; Nasdaq drops. Okta, CrowdStrike earnings in focus.(character count: 84)
news.summary: Amid turbulent Trump tariff news, the stock market faced significant setbacks as the Nasdaq dropped below crucial long-term support levels. Investors grappled with heavy losses as the market fluctuated. The latest reports indicated a challenging week for key players such as Okta and CrowdStrike, with their earnings results influencing market movements. The stock market showed major sell-offs in response to the ongoing tariff headlines, highlighting the volatility in trading.

news.headline: Oracle stock is down for 4th consecutive week, anticipation for fiscal Q3 earnings to reignite AI excitement. Investors eyeing ORCL's cloud growth.
news.summary: Oracle's stock is experiencing a downturn as it approaches its fiscal Q3 earnings announcement. Investors are paying close attention to the growth of ORCL's cloud sector. The stock is currently heading towards its fourth consecutive week of losses. The upcoming earnings report is anticipated to potentially revive excitement around artificial intelligence within the company.

news.headline: Stock market dodges jobs report bullet. Crypto reserve details disappoint. Germany may go nuclear. Jobs report: 151K vs 159K, private payrolls 140K vs 145K, hourly earnings 0.3% vs 0.3%.
news.summary: The article discusses the significance of the 200-day moving average in the stock market, noting that it is considered as a major support level by many investors despite lacking analytical evidence. It also highlights that oversold markets tend to bounce back, as indicated by the Relative Strength Index (RSI) on the chart. The article mentions that the stock market narrowly avoided a significant sell-off following the release of the jobs report, which showed nonfarm payrolls at 151K compared to the 159K consensus, nonfarm private payrolls at 140K versus a 145K consensus, average hourly earnings at 0.3% in line with expectations, and the average work week at 34.1 hours compared to the consensus of 34.2. Understanding market mechanics like positioning can provide investors with an edge in volatile times.

news.headline: Rocket Companies has received a Relative Strength Rating upgrade, indicating improved technical performance. Will this positive trend continue?
news.summary: Rocket Companies has received a Relative Strength Rating upgrade, indicating a boost in technical performance. Investors are now curious if this positive trend will persist.

news.headline: Hasbro stock's price performance improves, receiving upgrade for Relative Strength Rating by IBD.
news.summary: Toy company Hasbro has demonstrated a positive improvement in its stock price performance, prompting an upgrade to its IBD Relative Strength Rating. This indicates an upward trend in the company's stock performance compared to its peers. The specific numbers related to this performance improvement were not mentioned in the provided information.

news.headline: Ethereum's price at $2,159.01, $260.3B market cap. Traders hopeful for Q2 bullish run as seen historically.
news.summary: Ethereum (ETH) is currently moving within a sideways range despite trader optimism for future gains. The price of Ethereum stands at $2,159.01 with a market cap of $260.3 billion. In the last 24 hours, it has experienced a slight decrease of -2.5% and over the past week, it has fallen by -2.9%.On the other hand, Bitcoin (BTC) is priced at $86,815.85 with a market cap of $1.7 trillion. It has seen a decrease of -2.2% in the last 24 hours, but a positive trend of +3.8% over the past week.XRP is priced at $2.40 with a market cap of $139.4 billion. It experienced a decrease of -6.7% in the last 24 hours, but a significant increase of +12.4% over the past week.Experienced trader Lucky pointed out that Ethereum has historically performed well in the second quarter, with positive returns from 2016 to 2021, except for a minor dip in 2022. Lucky anticipates a bullish second quarter in 2023, which could lead to substantial gains for alternative cryptocurrencies. More details are available on Benzinga.com.
